calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Probate Administration For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for Jill Katz (Executor).

Mr. Malone stated that this was a no asset estate, that there was an account in Switzerland but that there was no money in the account, and that he would file the petition to close the estate. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE And Appraisal INVENTORY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal.
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor Jill Sydnie and to Counsel Paul Malone for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is April 6, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McDaniels.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
